_meta.purpose: Estimate Sam's effective 2025 race-day power from his observed bike split + actual weather
_meta.method: Inverse bisection on power, holding CdA/mass/Crr at placeholders
_meta.next_step: Compare estimated power vs measured TrainingPeaks power; adjust placeholders accordingly
